name: constraint_manifold_L0_L1
classification_note: Supporting early-manifold anchor: Layer 0 admissibility and Layer 1 fence restriction on the bounded terrain/ordering search space. Useful as the root admission/fence surface, but too bundled to stand as a single direct canonical lego row.

summary.scope_note: Supporting early admission manifold row covering root admissibility and Layer-1 fence restriction on the bounded terrain-ordering space.

pytorch.reason: not needed -- no gradient optimization in this root manifold row

pyg.reason: not needed -- no message-passing graph model

z3.reason: SAT/UNSAT admissibility by dimension plus bounded fence-valid assignment counting

cvc5.reason: not needed -- z3 is sufficient for the bounded root/fence checks

sympy.reason: symbolic Lie-algebra construction and closure checks across su(d) generators

clifford.reason: not needed -- root admission stays at matrix/Lie-algebra level

geomstats.reason: not needed -- no manifold metric/geodesic computation here

e3nn.reason: not needed -- no equivariant network layer

rustworkx.reason: not needed -- no graph routing object in this row

xgi.reason: not needed -- no hypergraph structure in this row

toponetx.reason: not needed -- no cell-complex discretization in this root manifold row

gudhi.reason: not needed -- no persistence/topology filtration in this row

fence_8_9_kernel_coupling.analytical: C(4,2) for T-group x C(4,2) for F-group = 36

fence_10_type_determines.analytical: ops fully determined by engine type

analytical_summary.note: Fences 11-15 further constrain; exact count from z3 enumeration below

constraint_power.L0_allows: any su(d) for d >= 2, continuous parameter spaces
